summary: Testing complete for P0 tasks: Contact Activity Feed revamp and Inbox Swipe Gestures. Backend tests all passed (8/8). Frontend features verified: Activity Feed shows absolute timestamps (Yesterday at 10:04 PM), 5 events initially with 'Show All X Events' button, expand/collapse chevrons on events, fallback titles for null events (Email Sent, Sent SMS, Personal SMS), View Conversation button navigates to thread page. Inbox swipe actions (Flag, Task, Tag, Archive) visible on web via WebSwipeableItem component. Flag conversation API tested and working.

issues: Thread page shows 'No messages yet' for API Test contact despite 19 messages logged - may be a data sync issue or the contact events are logged separately from conversation messages

critical_code_review_comments: WebSwipeableItem uses pointer events for web compatibility (onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp) - this is a good approach for web drag gestures
The data-testid attributes for swipe actions use format 'swipe-action-{key}' but actions are only visible when swiped - testing actual swipe gesture on web is complex
Tag picker modal uses data-testid='swipe-tag-{name}' pattern for tag options
seed_data_creation: None - used existing contact (ID: 69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1) with 28 events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 tested Inbox Swipe Gestures and Activity Feed. Backend APIs verified: 1) /api/messages/conversations/{user_id}/{conversation_id} accepts 'flagged' field for flag/unflag 2) /api/tasks/{user_id} creates tasks with contact_id, title, due_date 3) /api/tags/{user_id} returns tags list for tag picker. Frontend: WebSwipeableItem component wraps conversations on web, uses CSS transform with pointer events for drag. Activity Feed uses formatEventTime() with absolute dates, INITIAL_EVENT_COUNT=5, showAllEvents toggle, EVENT_TYPE_LABELS for fallback titles.
